title: Gloom Sculk
description: Retextures Sculk to resemble Gloom from LOZ:TOTK
body:
This pack simply retextures Sculk stuff to resemble Gloom from _The Legend of Zelda : Tears of the Kingdom_.

![Red Sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eafdf871f3ba36fec4131ce7e1ebbdcbdc19a2f.png)

It also changes the ominous stuff.

![Ominous Trial Spawners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71927c8b318c913e7672ba48b27374b73c682f3b.png)

Complete List of Changes :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Calibrated Sculk Sensor
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Sculk
- Sculk Catalyst
- Sculk Sensor
- Sculk Shrieker
- Sculk Vein
- Trial Spawner (Ominous)
- Vault (Ominous)
- Warden
- Disk Fragment 5
- Echo Shard
- Music Disk 5
- Ominous Trial Key
- Recovery Compass
- Silence Armor Trim Smithing Template (JUST THE TEMPLATE!)
- Bad Omen
- Darkness
- Raid Omen
- Trial Omen
- Sculk & Ominous Particals

</details>

**Terms for Asset Usage**

I'm ok with my textures being used in your resource pack; My only request is that you credit me in either the _pack.mcmeta_ or in a _README.txt_/_credits.txt_ in the ZIP, and also noted on the project page.


_Note - The showcase screenshots were taken with the Fresh Animations pack, those animations are NOT included in this pack._
